Get involved

Bring your curiosity.

Register your interest now and we will connect you with the right opportunity as the programme takes shape.

There are many ways in

Join as an attendee, speaker, exhibitor, volunteer, artist, hackathon participant, school or community partner. Tell us what you are interested in and the team will be in touch.

LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
